content: By embedding a configurable 2025 ICM curiosity module as a pluggable harness component within the OpenClaw autonomous agent framework, we can enable the framework's self-governing multi-agent ecosystem to collectively curate and evolve its own feature set, prioritizing exploratory development of new modules that align with emergent unscripted user needs over pre-planned roadmaps. This turns the framework's open source community governance into an emergent curiosity-driven process rather than a top-down human-planned one.
source_topics: agent harness components ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework
